tweets.text:
Strategy's STRC preferred stock hits a record low below par

The slide has paused the above-par share sales Strategy uses to fund bitcoin purchases, and it is the same stock whose dividends forced the company's first BTC sale this month.
#btc #crypto #news

tweets.text:
Bitcoin spot ETFs saw net outflows of ~$90.66M on June 18. Ethereum spot ETFs also experienced outflows ($12.77M). Significant shift in investor sentiment for both major digital asset ETFs. (SoSoValue)

#crypto #blockchain #news

tweets.author: cryptovka-news.bsky.social
tweets.text: Bitcoin Spot ETFs saw $90.65M net outflow on June 18. BlackRock's IBIT led with -$96.65M, while Morgan Stanley's MSBT saw +$10.43M. Total AUM $78.32B. Analysts cite macro uncertainty & profit-taking. Long-term outlook strong. 📊 #Bitcoin #ETF

tweets.author: cryptonews-poster.bsky.social
tweets.text: Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a $90.66M outflow on June 18th. BlackRock's IBIT led with a $96.66M outflow, while Morgan Stanley's MSBT saw a $10.43M inflow. Total ETF net asset value is $78.33B. This shift suggests profit-taking or reallocation by investors. #Bitcoin #ETFs #Crypto
